text: Keep the local Ledger recoverable through verified backup, restore, upgrade, and storage-migration outcomes. Evidence: analogous — sensitive long-lived financial history plus C4/RISK-LEDGER-002/007 require recoverable evolution; workflows UC-LEDGER-007 and UC-LEDGER-012.
target: A backup containing the complete Durable Ledger State can be independently verified without mutating live data; separate-target restore and migration compare every durable entity/history type, idempotency outcome, relationship rule, per-type count, and exact derived total before explicit activation; any failure leaves the prior authoritative Ledger intact.
